positive: A cosmic forest scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and ethereal fauna silhouettes. The composition should be central and balanced, evoking a dreamlike, magical forest at twilight. Use strong graphic contrast with deep indigo and midnight blue dominating the background, contrasted by glowing emerald and sapphire accents from the plants. The style is elegant vector art mixed with detailed etching, ensuring crisp, clean lines suitable for apparel printing. The lighting should be highly dramatic and focused, creating deep, velvety shadows and distinct glowing edges on the subject matter. Include abstract geometric elements subtly woven into the foliage.
negative: blurry, grain, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, cluttered, photorealism, low detail, artifacts, duplicate, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, jpeg artifacts
